privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task expects the agent to synthetically generate a robot sensor configuration in CoppeliaSim from a completely empty scene. The expected minimum number of test placements is exactly 5. The exact output file paths for the CSV (/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sensor_coverage.csv) and JSON (/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sensor_analysis.json) reports have been verified against the task description and verifier scripts.
